en: He. I welcome you to DBN Creations. Today's idiom of the day is. Burn up the midnight oil.
The meaning of it is. If someone is burning the midnight oil,
they are staying up very late in order to study or do some other work.
Let's make an example. Mary wants to be the first person to hand in the project to the teacher.
So, she has been burning the midnight oil to get done in two days.
Let me give you another example, lately, I'm facing health issues due to burning the midnight oil.
That's it for today. Thanks for watching. If you love this video then give us thumbs up,
share the video with your family and friends and hit the subscribe button.
Stay tuned for the next lesson. Meantime, take care, bye.
